summary_en: ¥190.0B upper limit; 95.0M shares (6.5% of outstanding); acquisition window May 21–Nov 18, 2026; open-market method. Part of ¥270.0B total buyback authorization for FY2026, funded from retained earnings policy targeting 50% payout ratio.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings announced on May 20, 2026 that its board of directors has authorized acquisition of up to 95.0 million shares of its own common stock for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥190.0 billion. The buyback represents 6.5% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock) and will be executed in the open market between May 21 and November 18, 2026. This authorization is part of the company's broader FY2026 capital allocation plan, under which MS&AD intends to implement approximately ¥270.0 billion in total share acquisitions. The company's stated policy is to distribute 50% of adjusted group earnings through dividends and share buybacks, with flexibility to adjust timing and size based on market conditions, business environment, and capital position. Share acquisitions serve dual purposes of enhancing shareholder returns and improving capital efficiency.
